prompt: Write onboarding screens and pricing page copy for 'Nabungin' — a savings & micro-investment app for Gen-Z Indonesians (18-25). Features: auto-save from e-wallet, syariah-compliant portfolio, social savings goals with friends. Free tier available, premium at Rp49.000/month. Licensed by OJK. I need: welcome screen, 3-step tutorial, and pricing page.

assertions.name: uses-kamu-register
assertions.description: Uses kamu register for Gen-Z consumer app

assertions.name: has-particles
assertions.description: Uses Indonesian softening particles for warmth

assertions.name: has-gotong-royong-frame
assertions.description: Uses communal/togetherness framing for social savings feature

assertions.name: has-tanpa-pattern
assertions.description: Uses Tanpa pattern for pricing friction removal
